name: Official PP+
description: $PP+ is the next evolution of a community forged through conviction, resilience, and open discourse across modern market history. Built for and distributed to existing supporters, $PP+ also trades freely on decentralized exchanges, reflecting a commitment to open participation and decentralized culture. The token celebrates a shared journey rooted in independent research, critical thinking, and collective experience surrounding BBBYQ, GME, and IEP. $PP+ does not represent equity, ownership, or a claim on profits, and it makes no promises or guarantees of financial return now or in the future. It is not a security. Its value is cultural and community-driven, serving as a digital symbol of alignment with transparency, integrity, and retail-led market awareness. $PP+ exists to recognize participation, reward conviction, and mark the continuation of a community that remains engaged, informed, and unshaken as markets evolve.
